chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 34 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.420/2021 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.421/2021 19.03.2026 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel questions pleaded seek to re-agitate factual controversy and / or are merely argumentative in nature. Since no question of law has been articulated, therefore, this reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
